name: Sausage - Cornbread Dressing - Slc
recipeIngredient: 2 cans chicken broth, undiluted (or turkey broth), 10-3/4 ounces each
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cornbread and sandwich bread in the chicken broth and water mixture in a large bowl for about 10 minutes, stirring until the liquid is absorbed.
2. In a separate pan, sauté onions and celery in butter over low heat until tender.
3. Add sausage to the pan and cook until browned, then drain any excess fat.
4. Combine the sausage mixture with eggs and pepper, stirring well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
5. Spoon the dressing into a lightly greased 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch baking dish.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour or until lightly browned. Yield: 8 servings.
Note: Homemade unsalted chicken broth, approximately 5 cups, can be substituted for canned broth and water; additional salt may need to be added.
